description: Checks the reputation of a domain.
name: domain

outputs.description: The name of the bad domain. Domain.Malicious.Vendor For malicious domains, the name of the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The type of the indicator. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
